이사야 59:1.content: Behold, Yahweh’s hand is not shortened, that it can’t save; nor his ear dull, that it can’t hear.

이사야 59:2.content: But your iniquities have separated you and your God, and your sins have hidden his face from you, so that he will not hear.

이사야 59:3.content: For your hands are defiled with blood, and your fingers with iniquity. Your lips have spoken lies. Your tongue mutters wickedness.

이사야 59:4.content: No one sues in righteousness, and no one pleads in truth. They trust in vanity, and speak lies. They conceive mischief, and give birth to iniquity.

이사야 59:5.content: They hatch adders’ eggs, and weave the spider’s web. He who eats of their eggs dies; and that which is crushed breaks out into a viper.

이사야 59:6.content: Their webs won’t become garments. They won’t cover themselves with their works. Their works are works of iniquity, and acts of violence are in their hands.

이사야 59:7.content: Their feet run to evil, and they hurry to shed innocent blood. Their thoughts are thoughts of iniquity. Desolation and destruction are in their paths.

이사야 59:8.content: They don’t know the way of peace; and there is no justice in their ways. They have made crooked paths for themselves; whoever goes in them doesn’t know peace.

이사야 59:9.content: Therefore justice is far from us, and righteousness doesn’t overtake us. We look for light, but see darkness; for brightness, but we walk in obscurity.

이사야 59:10.content: We grope for the wall like the blind. Yes, we grope as those who have no eyes. We stumble at noon as if it were twilight. Among those who are strong, we are like dead men.

이사야 59:11.content: We all roar like bears and moan bitterly like doves. We look for justice, but there is none, for salvation, but it is far off from us.

이사야 59:12.content: For our transgressions are multiplied before you, and our sins testify against us; for our transgressions are with us, and as for our iniquities, we know them:

이사야 59:13.content: transgressing and denying Yahweh, and turning away from following our God, speaking oppression and revolt, conceiving and uttering from the heart words of falsehood.

이사야 59:14.content: Justice is turned away backward, and righteousness stands far away; for truth has fallen in the street, and uprightness can’t enter.

이사야 59:15.content: Yes, truth is lacking; and he who departs from evil makes himself a prey. Yahweh saw it, and it displeased him that there was no justice.

이사야 59:16.content: He saw that there was no man, and wondered that there was no intercessor. Therefore his own arm brought salvation to him; and his righteousness sustained him.

이사야 59:17.content: He put on righteousness as a breastplate, and a helmet of salvation on his head. He put on garments of vengeance for clothing, and was clad with zeal as a mantle.

이사야 59:18.content: According to their deeds, he will repay as appropriate, wrath to his adversaries, recompense to his enemies; he will repay the islands their due.

이사야 59:19.content: So they will fear Yahweh’s name from the west, and his glory from the rising of the sun; for he will come as a rushing stream, which Yahweh’s breath drives.

이사야 59:20.content: “A Redeemer will come to Zion, and to those who turn from disobedience in Jacob,” says Yahweh.

이사야 59:21.content: “As for me, this is my covenant with them,” says Yahweh. “My Spirit who is on you, and my words which I have put in your mouth shall not depart out of your mouth, nor out of the mouth of your offspring, nor out of the mouth of your offspring’s offspring,” says Yahweh, “from now on and forever.”
